    toArray() - Method in class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Converts list into an array in the same order (head to tail).
    toString() - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Uses a StringBuilder and traverses through an Arraylist to create a String of every word in the hash table separated by a newline.
